task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Henry Kim' is visible as a selected attendee or tag (pill) in the attendees field.

task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Isabel Santos' is visible as a selected attendee or tag (pill) in the attendees field.

task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Alice Johnson' is still visible as a selected attendee or tag in the attendees field alongside the new additions.

task_completion.visual_evidence: 'David Chen' is still visible as a selected attendee or tag in the attendees field alongside the new additions.

task_completion.description: Ensure Emma Thompson remains on the attendees list
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Emma Thompson' is still visible as a selected attendee or tag in the attendees field alongside the new additions.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the meeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event is saved, showing the updated attendee list in the view mode (not edit mode), or a confirmation message/toast indicating the event was saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web UI in a browser, not a terminal window or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing event rather than deleting it and creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks into the existing 'Product Roadmap Planning' event on the calendar grid to edit it, rather than clicking a 'New' button to recreate it.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely selected the attendees from the application's dropdown/search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show dropdown menus, auto-complete suggestions, or standard UI attendee tags (pills) typical of the Odoo interface, rather than just raw text typed into a non-functional field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target event: 'Product Roadmap Planning' in the Odoo calendar. Attendees to add: 'Henry Kim' (VP Operations) and 'Isabel Santos' (Customer Success Manager). Attendees to retain: 'Alice Johnson', 'David Chen', and 'Emma Thompson'. The event must be modified, not deleted and recreated.
